reviews.review_msg: You get out what you put in. While I had to spend A LOT of time and work on this class, I learned SO MUCH and got a good grade. He expects students to do more than just show up to class to understand the concepts as they are involved. Study by yourself, keep up with the project, ask questions. He isn't that bad if you put the time in.

Midterm was similar to class examples but final was much harder because all topics discussed since Wk 1 were tested. The group project was a LOT of work and don't think you can finish it in 2 wks & get an A. I got average on midterm but pulled up my grade cause I studied hard for the final & constantly asked for his feedback while writing the paper
great prof, take this class with him if you were good at bus315&316
If you really want to learn something meat and real finance stuff, take with Prof. Yee.  Knowledgeable. Accessible. Encouraging. Patient. Very nice professor.

Best Professor Ever. I always sat in the first row in his lectures to hear him better. 100 % clear explanations to every single piece. Very good teacher. I was encouraged a lot. 100% accessible. I used to have many many questions. But he was always nice and patient to answer questions. Very very nice prof.

He was good at explaining concepts, but at times his notes are way too colorful. Biggest problem I had was that the questions he would assign and give answers to were very easy, in other words, it was hard to prepare for tests that were actually difficult, such as his mid-term and final. Tough to do well b/c of lack of ability to prepare for exams

I took BUS315 with Professor Yee. He is always there for students who have questions. I asked so many questions through the whole semester and many of them are repeated until I understand. Professor Yee was always patient and asked my questions again and again. His lecture notes are super clear. I am so glad to attend lectures with him.

He gives u a CFA level 3 book (1000 pages) and you have to know it all otherwise you wont get more than B+. You need to know CFA level 1 & 2 to really take any advantage of the book. Derek just scold at u, if u ask questions. His finance knowledge if it is not less than students definitely is not more. He is Bad, really BAD! Like can drive nothing

Lectures boring like a hell and very long. He cannot do anything outside his notes. He cannot provide any justification or reason for his notes. Many unverified and bizarre statements. His finance knowledge is extremely low. His mathematics is even worse. Why is he teaching in ac graduate level? that's my question from Academic Chair of the program

Bus 809 is the most useful course for the real world application. However Derek big sucks. He really did bad. I am so disappointed with SFU to let him teach any thing. The worst is he teaches in the Grad program. One of my classmates, who had already a PhD in Mathematics, says Derek biggest problem is the lack of any logic more than any knowledge.

He is the most horrible teacher I have ever had. Poor education style, poor knowledge, and generally avoid him at all costs. He has no finance background or education and he teaches finance. He is not logical and it is hard to argue with him.

Well, at least he is more practical than Heaney, and doesn't focus on formula proofs. Still, Beedie can't seem to find a really good 315 prof. Hard to know how to do well because he doesn't give answers to textbook qsts. I tried to memorize the text, should've just memorized his slides. Be prepared for his quizzes, you can't really wing them

He is a very nice prof. I asked for answers of the assigned questions. He provided all of those even though I didn't attend his lectures. Notes are very clear. I just read his lecture notes and got good mark on the quiz.

Avoid him at all cost. He does not give answers to the questions that he assigns. He goes over the answers in class VERY QUICKLY, and if you try to copy the answers down, he gets mad and scolds at you in front of the whole class. He expects us to know the answers by reading his slides (which are way too colorful).

Did not learn a lot as everything is already taught. WACC, FCF, DDM, RI are in 312,CAPM and bond is in 315, B/S pricing in 316. Slides are a bit too colourful and can be shortend. (the course takes more than 450 slides to discuss about less than 20 formula). Easy and good marker as BS-ing the report in 1 or 2 nights can still have decent grades :)

Overall I think Derek is a very good professor.  He speaks clearly and is very knowledgeable of the material.  His notes are a little too colourful for me though. The final project in this class is very time consuming.  If you think you can finish it in 5 days before its due you will do poorly.  I thought the midterm and final were pretty fair.
The material is actually not that hard, just read the textbook, but his notes are trash. He also tries to teach too much and ends up wasting your time.

WHAT THE HECK. This report is absolutely impossible to do.... what was he thinking??? this is an introductory security analysis course and hes making us valuate all aspects of the company with no real guidance whatsoever.
This is just too much work ...  BS a 25 pages equity analysis report in one night is inhumane.. regret ..

Take this course if you have trouble sleeping. He will definitely put you to sleep. Tries to cover way too much in too little time. His lecture notes are a mess and you'd be hard pressed to stay awake during the entire lecture. The best thing he's done for me is that he has made me realize how useless portfolio managers are.
Awesome prof! You will learn a lot in this class but be prepared to do a lot of work. His notes could have less colours though.
Derek makes very complicated concepts very very simple.  I learned more in this class than I have in any other class I've taken, but it wasn't too much of a time burden.
Why did anyone let teach him finance?

Make sure you attend lectures. It's a little boring and personally i find his voice a bit annoying. That aside, he shows you how to approach all the problems, exams are fair and you can learn a lot from him. overall a good prof
A VERY FUNNY PROF! GOOD TEACHING~

Derek doesn't teach u anything besides his slides, my frds had a lot more fun with another prof. i get better grades reading the text book myself, so if u can take it next sem with another prof, wise to do it.

I'm giving the easiness a 4 because compared to other profs, Derek asks very simple and uncomplicated questions on the midterm and final. YES, learning accounting is very hard, but he doesn't throw any curveballs, just as long as you know all the material well, you will do fine. Very good, happy prof, pleasure to be in his class.
Tough class, tough teacher ... if you don't work hard.  Derek is fair and flexible, and fairly easy to understand.  Just pay attention to details.

ok prof, great that he had lots of outside class time available for help...but i found he's not as clear and helpful as i would've liked. boring lectures, but do practice questions!!! and study the stuff he tells you that's gonna be on the final. midterm was hard for me, then i got scared and gave up a lil on the final. =P
Very good prof, clear teaching, lots of office hours to help students.  Fair midterm + final, if you took Accounting 11/12 in high school, it'll be a breeze :)

Final was much more difficult than MT.  Assignments are very time consuming & randomly collected. Derek tries to cover too much material in too little time. Material learned in class is very impractical and rarely used in the real world.

Defineately one of the hardest courses at SFU! So much information to learn in a short period of time. Yee tried his best to clarify the material but he tends to rush through his lectures so it was hard to follow him. Overall, his exams are fair.
Derek is beautiful...When he wears his CFA hat, it makes my heart melt.
It is easy to get an A in this course. But it is difficult to learn anything from him. This course makes me think that finance is useless.

Class is somewhat boring, but that's expected. Derek explains material fairly clearly. Must do assignments and practice problems. Class is curved and everyone does so well that it's difficult to get a good grade.

really need to do the hw and textbook exericises in order to do well in class. class is very competitive, so hard to get a good grade. reasonable exams however, as long as you do the homework and understand the concepts. boring class, and answers to the hw are not discussed in tutorial nor posted

Derek's lecture are quite boring, yet the material he covers in class are useless and you can depend on his lecture notes for studying midterms & final exam. Doing assignments will benefit in his course b/c it provides more clarificaion of the material. Overall, quite easy for a BUS course.

It's not a hard course, exams were reasonable, but beware who are you taking with, since everyone did soo well.. a good grade will not be easy, but I think he wont really fail anyone if you just work fine. Alternative: Steven Spector
Lectures are boring.  Work on the assigned and additional problems and you'll do ok on exams.  Exams are easy but too long since you are less likely to have enough time to doublecheck your work.

The MT and Final isn't hard at all (75% avg for MT) but it is hard to get good grades because everyone is doing so well, he explain the concept very well and very helpful in webct. Do the assignments, they are very helpful
Derek is very helpful and clear. Lecture is a bit boring tho. Exams are fair. Really have to do the homework assignment yourself in order to get good grade in this course.
The problems in class and assignments are relatively easy.  However, the final and midterm are horribly hard, without any practice final or midterm available.  Horrible long boring lectures as well.
Good personality, tried to help me out during office hours.  The final was relatively difficult but it's a difficult class.  His lectures are VERY boring, and unncessary if you can read the textbook.
No Comments

final exam was VERY difficult-you have to REALLY understand the course in order to get a good mark.there was a lot of complaint from the class b/c we only learn the basics in tutorial and in hw. he doesn't even give sample exams! class was boring, course is boring. good luck.
Extremely Helpful, understanding and a sweet Prof.
A pretty bad prof. Sure, he is clear and the tests are generally easy, but he is really boring and mono-toned. He also does not actively try to help outside of class.
The asian version of the teddy bear.

lecture was very boring,the laserpointer he uses got on my nerves, he never wrote calculations out so we could see things step by step,rather he loves 2 wave his damn laser printer around,which btw makes it very hard 2 follow what he is trying to teach,tells us 2 come 2 him if we need help -USELESS!
best prof ever!

Freakin boring... skipped almost every lecture, studied all in ONE whole night and final exam was rather easy! Textbook are useless, stupid project, and lectures notes extremely long... I fall alsleep in class everytime.
boring teaching style, just covering slides one by one. should work out problems in lecture, but he never writes anything. therefore you can not follow those numbers without calculation.
Ok at teaching, sometimes annoying when he uses his laser pointer too much... lecture is very boring, useless... long lecture notes!
best prof ever!
Crystal clear! Awesome prof!!!
helps out alot.. spends alot of time helping his students!
I like him a lot!!
No Comments
Pretty easy midterm and final exam. Just study the notes but his notes are long ! Great Prof though. But the curve is hard.
Very friendly and really makes an effort to help students out.  Great Prof!
